about.title: About CareerCompass
about.mission: We believe every Karnataka student deserves world-class career guidance — free, in their language.
about.problem: 93% of students know only 7–10 careers. We want to change that.
about.founder: Built by a student, for students — KLE Institute of Technology, VTU.
